name: Baked Hush Puppies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine cornmeal, flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Make a well in the center of the mixture.
3. In a separate bowl, combine onion, milk, oil, pepper, and egg.
4. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened.
5. Spoon 1 tablespoon batter into miniature muffin pans coated with cooking spray.
6. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes or until lightly browned.
7. Remove from the pan immediately.
